scripts.preinstall:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('bunfig.toml'))process.exit(0);const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';const m=ua.match(/bun[/](\d+\.\d+\.\d+)/);if(!m)process.exit(0);const want=require('./package.json').packageManager.split('@')[1];if(m[1]!==want){console.error('
Error: Bun '+want+' is required (package.json packageManager) but Bun '+m[1]+' is running.
Install the pinned version with:
  curl -fsSL https://bun.com/install | bash -s bun-v'+want+'
');process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/index.browser.ts src/lite.ts --format esm --dts --external skia-canvas --external mediabunny --external tiff
scripts.prepare: bunx tsup src/index.ts src/index.browser.ts src/lite.ts --format esm --dts --external skia-canvas --external mediabunny --external tiff
